revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:4 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:4月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 4월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:4 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:四月十六]][[zh:四月十六]]
{{Not to be confused with|April 16|qq=April 16}} <!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=四月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 4월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar April|qq=}} '''April 16''' is the 16th day of the month {{ill|April (Lunisolar)|ja|4月 (旧暦)|lt=April (Uzuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/April (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 4th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senshū|qid=Q96759839|1=senshū}}{{efn|ja|先勝|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senshō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Gangyō|en|Gangyō|qid=Q747451|lt=Gangyō|1=Gangyō}} Year 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|June 1|en|June 1|qid=Q2625|lt=June 1|1=June 1}}, 877; Gregorian equivalent {{ill|June 5|en|June 5|qid=Q2622|lt=June 5|1=June 5}}, 877) – Era name changed from {{ill|Jōgan|en|Jōgan|qid=Q1075635|lt=Jōgan|1=Jōgan}} to Gangyō. * {{ill|Genryaku|en|Genryaku|qid=Q1194250|lt=Genryaku|1=Genryaku}} Year 1 (Julian {{ill|May 27|en|May 27|qid=Q2587|lt=May 27|1=May 27}}, 1184; Gregorian {{ill|June 3|en|June 3|qid=Q2623|lt=June 3|1=June 3}}, 1184) – Era name changed from {{ill|Juei|en|Juei|qid=Q598057|lt=Juei|1=Juei}} to Genryaku. * {{ill|Shōkyō|en|Shōkyō|qid=Q1069086|lt=Shōkei|1=Shōkyō}} 2 / {{ill|Genkō (1331–1334)|en|Genkō (1331–1334)|qid=Q1194556|lt=Genkō|1=Genkō (1331–1334)}} 3 (Julian {{ill|May 30|en|May 30|qid=Q2590|lt=May 30|1=May 30}}, 1333; Gregorian {{ill|June 7|en|June 7|qid=Q2616|lt=June 7|1=June 7}}, 1333) – {{ill|Ashikaga Takauji|en|Ashikaga Takauji|qid=Q297107|lt=Ashikaga Takauji|1=Ashikaga Takauji}} enters Kyoto to suppress Emperor {{ill|Emperor Go-Daigo|en|Emperor Go-Daigo|qid=Q313942|lt=Go-Daigo|1=Emperor Go-Daigo}}’s uprising. * {{ill|Ōei|en|Ōei|qid=Q1193078|lt=Ōei|1=Ōei}} 4 (Julian {{ill|May 13|en|May 13|qid=Q2560|lt=May 13|1=May 13}}, 1397; Gregorian {{ill|May 21|en|May 21|qid=Q2580|lt=May 21|1=May 21}}, 1397) – Ridge-pole-raising ceremony ({{ill|Topping out|en|Topping out|qid=Q1075723|lt=Jōtō-shiki|1=Topping out}}) held for {{ill|Kinkaku-ji|de|Kinkaku-ji|ja|金閣寺|zh|金閣寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinkaku-ji|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鹿苑寺}}. * {{ill|Kakitsu|en|Kakitsu|qid=Q1193238|lt=Kakitsu|1=Kakitsu}} Year 1 (Julian {{ill|May 6|en|May 6|qid=Q2552|lt=May 6|1=May 6}}, 1441; Gregorian {{ill|May 15|en|May 15|qid=Q2562|lt=May 15|1=May 15}}, 1441) – {{ill|Yūki War|en|Yūki War|qid=Q11606564|lt=Yūki War|1=Yūki War}}: {{ill|Yūki Castle|de|Burg Yūki|ja|結城城|zh|結城城|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yūki Castle|1=Yuki Castle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11606565}} falls. * {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} 19 (Gregorian {{ill|May 24|en|May 24|qid=Q2584|lt=May 24|1=May 24}}, 1614) – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyori|en|Toyotomi Hideyori|qid=Q313641|lt=Toyotomi Hideyori|1=Toyotomi Hideyori}} rebuilds the burned Great Buddha Hall of {{ill|Hōkō-ji (Kyoto)|en|Hōkō-ji (Kyoto)|qid=Q1045971|lt=Hōkō-ji|1=Hōkō-ji (Kyoto)}} ({{ill|Kyoto Daibutsu|de|Kyoto Daibutsu|ja|京の大仏|zh|京之大佛|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kyoto Daibutsu|1=Great Buddha Hall of Hōkō-ji|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11374178}}).
== Births == * {{ill|Kōan (Kamakura period)|en|Kōan (Kamakura period)|qid=Q389180|lt=Kōan|1=Kōan (Kamakura period)}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1278|en|1278|qid=Q5533|lt=1278|1=1278}} {{ill|May 9|en|May 9|qid=Q2556|lt=May 9|1=May 9}} {{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 1278th year {{ill|May 16|en|May 16|qid=Q2574|lt=May 16|1=May 16}}) – {{ill|Kokan Shiren|en|Kokan Shiren|qid=Q2091289|lt=Kora Shiren|1=Kokan Shiren}}、{{ill|Rinzai school|en|Rinzai school|qid=Q639625|lt=Rinzai sect|1=Rinzai school}} Monk（+ {{ill|1346|en|1346|qid=Q6080|lt=1346|1=1346}}）. == Deaths == * {{ill|Shinpō (Wu)|ja|神鳳 (呉)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinpō (Wu)|1=Shenfeng|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8011727}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|252|en|252|qid=Q33804|lt=252|1=252}} {{ill|May 11|en|May 11|qid=Q2558|lt=May 11|1=May 11}} {{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} 252nd year 5月11日) – {{ill|Sun Quan|en|Sun Quan|qid=Q313327|lt=Sun Quan|1=Sun Quan}} 、{{ill|Eastern Wu|en|Eastern Wu|qid=Q274488|lt=Wu (Three Kingdoms)|1=Eastern Wu}} の初代 {{ill|Emperor|en|Emperor|qid=Q39018|lt=Emperor|1=Emperor}} （* {{ill|182|en|182|qid=Q31393|lt=182|1=182}}）. * {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} 13th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1585|en|1585|qid=Q6736|lt=1585|1=1585}} {{ill|May 15|en|May 15|qid=Q2562|lt=May 15|1=May 15}}) – {{ill|Niwa Nagahide|en|Niwa Nagahide|qid=Q2900560|lt=Niwa Nagahide|1=Niwa Nagahide}} 、{{ill|Busho (Rank)|ja|武将|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Busho (Rank)|1=military commander|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11545923}} （* {{ill|1535|en|1535|qid=Q6453|lt=1535|1=1535}}）.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|4|15|4|17|3|16|5|4|0416|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
